title: Construction Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate, usually through subordinate supervisory personnel, activities concerned with the construction and maintenance of structures, facilities, and systems. Participate in the conceptual development of a construction project and oversee its organization, scheduling, budgeting, and implementation. Includes managers in specialized construction fields, such as carpentry or plumbing.

tasks.text: Inspect or review projects to monitor compliance with building and safety codes or other regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or implement quality control programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, schedule, or coordinate construction project activities to meet deadlines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit budget estimates, progress reports, or cost tracking reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and supervise construction or related workers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine labor requirements for dispatching workers to construction sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with supervisory personnel, owners, contractors, or design professionals to discuss and resolve matters, such as work procedures, complaints, or construction problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare contracts or negotiate revisions to contractual agreements with architects, consultants, clients, suppliers, or subcontractors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study job specifications to determine appropriate construction methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, organize, or direct activities concerned with the construction or maintenance of structures, facilities, or systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contract or oversee craft work, such as painting or plumbing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate damage, accidents, or delays at construction sites to ensure that proper construction procedures are being followed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret and explain plans and contract terms to representatives of the owner or developer, including administrative staff, workers, or clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement new or modified plans in response to delays, bad weather, or construction site emergencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Requisition supplies or materials to complete construction projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply for and obtain all necessary permits or licenses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform, or contract others to perform, pre-building assessments, such as conceptual cost estimating, rough order of magnitude estimating, feasibility, or energy efficiency, environmental, and sustainability assessments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate construction methods and determine cost-effectiveness of plans, using computer models.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect or review projects to monitor compliance with environmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or implement environmental protection programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Secure third-party verification from sources, such as Leadership in Energy Efficient Design (LEED), to ensure responsible design and building activities or to achieve favorable LEED ratings for building projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement training programs on environmentally responsible building topics to update employee skills and knowledge.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop construction budgets to compare green and non-green construction alternatives, in terms of short-term costs, long-term costs, or environmental impacts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply green building strategies to reduce energy costs or minimize carbon output or other sources of harm to the environment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct acquisition of land for construction projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
